title: cyclosorus lebeufii
intro: Cyclosorus lebeufii, also known as the Lebeuf's fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Cyclosorus lebeufii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
